◎简　　介  

　　本集节目中Fergus Beeley带您了解苏格兰高地生活着的独特的野生动物。Natural World: A Highland HavenThis stunningly beautiful film reveals the unique wildlife of the Scottish Highlands, seen through the eyes of filmmaker Fergus Beeley.Based for a year at Loch Maree and the surrounding hills in Scotland's far North West, Beeley presents his personal view of the shy animals whose lives are ruled by the rai...
